``` {r Surveillance duration}
enrollments |>
  inner_join(patients, join_by(patient == key)) |>
  filter(NEOIPC_ADMISSION_DOL == 1 & NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_REASON == 1) |>
  group_by(birth_weight_category_50g, .drop = FALSE) |>
  summarise(pd = median(NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS)) |>
  subset(!is.na(pd)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = birth_weight_category_50g, y = pd, group=1)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE, breaks = \(x) x[c(FALSE, TRUE)]) +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1))
```
